title: Modern CSRF Defenses
description: Evaluate the limitations of the `SameSite` cookie attribute in CSRF protection. Implement custom header verification as a CSRF defense for SPAs and mobile-backed APIs. Design comprehensive CSRF protection strategies for various application architectures.
objectives: Evaluate the limitations of the `SameSite` cookie attribute in CSRF protection.
Implement custom header verification as a CSRF defense for SPAs and mobile-backed APIs.
Design comprehensive CSRF protection strategies for various application architectures.
